title: Algebra
summary: 9709 P3 algebra — modulus, partial fractions, binomial expansion, and polynomials with PhET expression exchange.
learningObjectives: Sketch and solve equations involving modulus functions.
Decompose rational expressions into partial fractions.
Use factor theorem with complex roots.

simpleExplanation.title: P3 algebraic tools
simpleExplanation.summary: P3 algebra feeds integration and differential equations. Partial fractions must be proper — divide first if needed.
steps: |f(x)| graph: reflect negative parts above x-axis.
Repeated factors need Ax + B over quadratic terms.
Binomial valid for |x| < 1 when n is not a positive integer.
Complex roots of real polynomials occur in conjugate pairs.

sections.content: **P3 Algebra** (3.1) overlaps **P2** (2.1) at higher difficulty. **Modulus** sketching and **partial fractions** appear every session.
